Keyword: vector retrieval

This document focuses on vector retrieval, cosine distance, nearest-neighbor search, and semantic lookup.

Reference phrase: vector retrieval should return doc-02.md as the top relevant fixture document.

Additional context:
- qmd proper port
- qqd parity
- upstream oracle
- repeated relevance context for chunked semantic indexing
- vector retrieval retrieval fidelity matters for chunk-level parity
- this paragraph is intentionally repeated to force multi-chunk embeddings
